2606.21428.title: Does Mixture-of-Experts Actually Help Inference on Consumer and Edge Hardware? An Empirical Study
2606.21428.paper_summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models are often described as ideal for resource-constrained inference. Each token activates only a small subset of experts, so the per-token compute cost, in floating-point operations (FLOPs), resembles that of a much smaller dense model. Whether that FLOP advantage survives in practice is far less clear. We ask whether MoE models actually run faster and cheaper than comparable dense models on consumer-grade and edge hardware. We benchmark OLMoE-1B-7B (1.3 B active of 6.9 B total) against three dense baselines on an Apple M2 Pro and an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano 8 GB through llama.cpp, measuring throughput, memory, and on-device energy. The answer is device-dependent: OLMoE's active-parameter advantage is only partly realised on the laptop (~10% behind the same-active Llama-3.2-1B) and erodes on the edge device (~31% behind, at 2.1$\times$ the energy per token, with peak memory at the 8 GB ceiling). Patching llama.cpp to time the decode graph node-by-node shows routing accounts for under 9% of MoE-block compute on the cleaner edge backend, so the gap reflects total-parameter memory footprint, expert dispatch, and KV-cache pressure rather than routing. The implication is that on bandwidth-bound edge hardware, inference cost tracks total parameters, not active ones, and sparse activation does not buy back what the device is constrained on. These findings are bounded to one MoE model at this parameter scale and two devices, and we release the full measurement harness and per-run data.
2606.21428.paper_summary_zh: 混合專家（MoE）語言模型通常被描述為在資源受限的推理中理想的選擇。每個標記僅激活一小部分專家，因此每個標記的計算成本，以浮點運算（FLOPs）來計算，類似於一個小得多的密集模型。這種FLOP優勢在實踐中是否依然存在則不太明確。我們詢問MoE模型是否實際上在消費級和邊緣硬體上運行得比可比的密集模型更快且更便宜。我們在Apple M2 Pro和NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano 8 GB上通過llama.cpp基準測試OLMoE-1B-7B（1.3 B活躍的6.9 B總數）對三個密集基準進行測試，測量吞吐量、內存和設備內能耗。答案取決於設備：OLMoE的活躍參數優勢僅在筆記本電腦上部分實現（約比同時活躍的Llama-3.2-1B慢10%），在邊緣設備上則減少（約慢31%，每個標記的能耗為2.1$\times$，峰值內存達到8 GB的上限）。對llama.cpp進行修補以逐個節點計時解碼圖顯示，路由在更乾淨的邊緣後端中僅佔MoE區塊計算的不到9%，因此差距反映的是總參數的內存佔用、專家調度和KV緩存壓力，而不是路由。這意味著在帶寬受限的邊緣硬體上，推理成本與總參數相關，而不是活躍參數，稀疏激活並未彌補設備的限制。這些發現僅限於在此參數規模下的一個MoE模型和兩個設備，我們發布了完整的測量工具和每次運行的數據。
2606.21428.author: Alfarizy Alfarizy et.al.
2606.21428.authors: Alfarizy Alfarizy, Hung Truong Thanh Nguyen, René Richard, Roozbeh Razavi-Far, Hung Cao
